mapper.sql: id , login_id AS loginId , password , name , gender , birthday , delete_yn AS deleteYn , created_date AS createDate , modified_date AS modifiedDate
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM member WHERE delete_yn = 0 AND login_id = #{loginId}
mapper.update: UPDATE member SET delete_yn = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member WHERE login_id = #{loginId}
